homepage.heading: Body-Aware Outfit Recommendations
homepage.subheading: Upload full-body photos -> set scene and budget -> get outfit suggestions tailored to your body shape.
homepage.photoHint: The system infers shoulder type, waistline, and proportions automatically. No manual body-type input needed.
homepage.idleResult: Upload photos and fill scene/budget to get recommendations.
homepage.analysisFailed: Body analysis failed. Please retry with clear photos.

recommendation.title: Recommendation Results
recommendation.autoGenerating: Generating outfit images... this may take 20-30 seconds
recommendation.imageDelayed: Image generation was delayed. Please try again later.

bodyAnalysis.disclaimer: Estimated ranges only from photos. You can manually correct height and weight below.
bodyAnalysis.manualPriorityNote: Manual correction has been prioritized for size recommendation.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Management (Independent Long-term Module)
wardrobe.description: Wardrobe is separated from the recommendation homepage and will evolve independently without slowing down the core recommendation flow.

hat.title: Hat Recommendation (MVP)
hat.description: Upload a face or upper-body photo, choose style preference, and get 3 hat suggestions with reason, avoid notes, and styling tips.
hat.needPhoto: Please upload a face or upper-body photo first.
hat.recommendFailed: Hat recommendation failed, please try again later.
hat.generationFailed: Image was not generated. Please try again later.
hat.previewGenerateFailed: Preview generation failed. Please try again later.

structured_baseball_cap.name: Structured Baseball Cap
structured_baseball_cap.reason: Clean silhouette matches minimal style lines.
structured_baseball_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
structured_baseball_cap.tips: Start with neutral colors, then add one accent. Pair with crisp shirts for a tidy everyday look.

wool_6_panel_cap.name: Wool 6-Panel Cap
wool_6_panel_cap.reason: Soft texture adds detail without visual noise.
wool_6_panel_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
wool_6_panel_cap.tips: Try muted earth tones; wool reads best with matte fabrics and simple outerwear.

short_brim_cap.name: Short-Brim Cap
short_brim_cap.reason: Compact brim keeps the look sharp and tidy.
short_brim_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
short_brim_cap.tips: Keep the rest of the outfit streamlined so the short brim stays the focal point.

flat_cap.name: Flat Cap
flat_cap.reason: Refined shape works with smart-casual layering.
flat_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
flat_cap.tips: Pair with blazers, knits, or tailored trousers; keep patterns subtle.

wool_newsboy_cap.name: Wool Newsboy Cap
wool_newsboy_cap.reason: Adds mature texture while keeping a polished tone.
wool_newsboy_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
wool_newsboy_cap.tips: Works well with wool coats and scarves; stick to two main colors in the outfit.

dark_minimal_baseball_cap.name: Dark Minimal Baseball Cap
dark_minimal_baseball_cap.reason: Low-profile option for relaxed business days.
dark_minimal_baseball_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
dark_minimal_baseball_cap.tips: Match with navy, charcoal, or black layers for a cohesive low-contrast look.

classic_baseball_cap.name: Classic Baseball Cap
classic_baseball_cap.reason: Easy daily match with tees, shirts, and jackets.
classic_baseball_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
classic_baseball_cap.tips: Use neutral cap colors first; add one brighter piece (tee or sneakers) if you want pop.

bucket_hat.name: Bucket Hat
bucket_hat.reason: Soft brim balances upper-body volume and face outline.
bucket_hat.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
bucket_hat.tips: Balance volume with a fitted top; denim or cotton layers keep the vibe casual.

beanie_light_rib.name: Beanie (Light Rib)
beanie_light_rib.reason: Adds casual warmth and works with street styling.
beanie_light_rib.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
beanie_light_rib.tips: Slight slouch is fine; pair with hoodies, bombers, or long coats in cold weather.

mid_brim_bucket_hat.name: Mid-Brim Bucket Hat
mid_brim_bucket_hat.reason: Mid brim helps balance a rounder face shape.
mid_brim_bucket_hat.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
mid_brim_bucket_hat.tips: Keep the brim level; avoid huge prints on tops so the face stays visually centered.

medium_crown_baseball_cap.name: Medium-Crown Baseball Cap
medium_crown_baseball_cap.reason: Balanced crown avoids over-emphasizing broad shoulders.
medium_crown_baseball_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
medium_crown_baseball_cap.tips: Medium crown height keeps proportions even; pair with structured shoulders on outerwear sparingly.

baseball_cap.name: Classic Baseball Cap
baseball_cap.reason: Easy daily match with tees, shirts, and jackets.
baseball_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
baseball_cap.tips: Use neutral cap colors first; add one brighter piece (tee or sneakers) if you want pop.

beanie.name: Beanie (Light Rib)
beanie.reason: Adds casual warmth and works with street styling.
beanie.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
beanie.tips: Slight slouch is fine; pair with hoodies, bombers, or long coats in cold weather.

newsboy_cap.name: Wool Newsboy Cap
newsboy_cap.reason: Adds mature texture while keeping a polished tone.
newsboy_cap.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
newsboy_cap.tips: Works well with wool coats and scarves; stick to two main colors in the outfit.

beret.name: Flat Cap
beret.reason: Refined shape works with smart-casual layering.
beret.avoid: Avoid oversized logos and very tall crowns that overpower face balance.
beret.tips: Pair with blazers, knits, or tailored trousers; keep patterns subtle.

reason.short_height_low: Shorter stature: prioritize cropped outerwear, a defined waist, and slightly lifted footwear to lengthen the leg line. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.short_height_mid: Shorter stature: prioritize cropped outerwear, a defined waist, and slightly lifted footwear to lengthen the leg line. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.short_height_high: Shorter stature: prioritize cropped outerwear, a defined waist, and slightly lifted footwear to lengthen the leg line. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.leg_short_low: Shorter leg ratio: cropped outerwear, high-rise bottoms, and clean vertical lines help stretch the lower body visually. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.leg_short_mid: Shorter leg ratio: cropped outerwear, high-rise bottoms, and clean vertical lines help stretch the lower body visually. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.leg_short_high: Shorter leg ratio: cropped outerwear, high-rise bottoms, and clean vertical lines help stretch the lower body visually. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.belly_low: Midsection needs ease: relaxed drape on top with a higher waist on bottoms keeps the silhouette calm and flattering. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.belly_mid: Midsection needs ease: relaxed drape on top with a higher waist on bottoms keeps the silhouette calm and flattering. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.belly_high: Midsection needs ease: relaxed drape on top with a higher waist on bottoms keeps the silhouette calm and flattering. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.broad_shoulders_low: Broad shoulders: simplify upper-body detail and add balanced volume through trousers to keep proportions even. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.broad_shoulders_mid: Broad shoulders: simplify upper-body detail and add balanced volume through trousers to keep proportions even. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.broad_shoulders_high: Broad shoulders: simplify upper-body detail and add balanced volume through trousers to keep proportions even. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.thick_thighs_low: Stronger thighs: straight or relaxed tapered pants read cleaner than skinny fits for everyday comfort. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.thick_thighs_mid: Stronger thighs: straight or relaxed tapered pants read cleaner than skinny fits for everyday comfort. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.thick_thighs_high: Stronger thighs: straight or relaxed tapered pants read cleaner than skinny fits for everyday comfort. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.narrow_shoulders_low: Narrow shoulders: layering, structured collars, and light shoulder definition add presence without bulk. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.narrow_shoulders_mid: Narrow shoulders: layering, structured collars, and light shoulder definition add presence without bulk. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.narrow_shoulders_high: Narrow shoulders: layering, structured collars, and light shoulder definition add presence without bulk. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.slim_low: Lean build: light layering and gentle volume add shape without overwhelming the frame. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.slim_mid: Lean build: light layering and gentle volume add shape without overwhelming the frame. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.slim_high: Lean build: light layering and gentle volume add shape without overwhelming the frame. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.muscular_low: Muscular build: controlled silhouettes up top with straight legs keep the outfit relaxed, not overly tight. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.muscular_mid: Muscular build: controlled silhouettes up top with straight legs keep the outfit relaxed, not overly tight. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.muscular_high: Muscular build: controlled silhouettes up top with straight legs keep the outfit relaxed, not overly tight. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.athletic_low: Athletic frame: easy room through the chest and shoulders with clean leg lines keeps the look natural. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.athletic_mid: Athletic frame: easy room through the chest and shoulders with clean leg lines keeps the look natural. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.athletic_high: Athletic frame: easy room through the chest and shoulders with clean leg lines keeps the look natural. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.stocky_low: Stockier build: vertical lines, low-contrast color blocks, and steady proportions reduce horizontal emphasis. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.stocky_mid: Stockier build: vertical lines, low-contrast color blocks, and steady proportions reduce horizontal emphasis. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.stocky_high: Stockier build: vertical lines, low-contrast color blocks, and steady proportions reduce horizontal emphasis. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.
reason.balanced_low: Balanced proportions: neat tailoring and a clear waistline keep everyday outfits sharp and easy to wear. Tight budget: focus on a strong core trio and fewer competing pieces.
reason.balanced_mid: Balanced proportions: neat tailoring and a clear waistline keep everyday outfits sharp and easy to wear. Mid budget: balance fabric quality with versatility across weekdays.
reason.balanced_high: Balanced proportions: neat tailoring and a clear waistline keep everyday outfits sharp and easy to wear. Higher budget: you can add finishing layers and accessories for a more complete kit.

color.daily_minimal: Muted neutrals with one quiet accent — easy for commuting and errands.
color.daily_business: Navy, charcoal, and crisp white for a calm weekday office tone.
color.daily_casual: Soft neutrals with denim-friendly blues for relaxed daily wear.
color.date_minimal: Restrained contrast: one soft highlight against a neutral base.
color.date_business: Polished neutrals with subtle texture for a smart-casual evening.
color.date_casual: Warm mid-tones that feel approachable without looking overstyled.
color.interview_minimal: Clean, low-noise neutrals that read confident and composed.
color.interview_business: Classic suit-adjacent neutrals with minimal pattern noise.
color.interview_casual: Neat separates in conservative tones — relaxed but still respectful.
color.travel_minimal: Packable neutrals that mix easily across multiple outfits.
color.travel_business: Dark, wrinkle-friendly neutrals that still look pulled together.
color.travel_casual: Comfort-first neutrals with one bright accent for photos and daytime walks.
color.school_minimal: Simple palettes that stay tidy between classes and study blocks.
color.school_business: Smart-casual neutrals suitable for presentations or club fairs.
color.school_casual: Easy-going colors that pair with sneakers and backpacks.
color.work_minimal: Desk-to-dinner neutrals with crisp contrast at collars and cuffs.
color.work_business: Structured neutrals with controlled shine — boardroom friendly.
color.work_casual: Relaxed tailoring colors: soft blues, greys, and off-white layers.

fit.vertical_emphasis: Use vertical lines, higher rises, and shorter jackets to lift the eye upward.
fit.upper_simple_lower_volume: Keep the upper body clean and let trousers carry balanced volume.
fit.waist_definition_drape: Define the waist softly with drape rather than clingy layers.
fit.balanced_silhouette: Balance top and bottom weight with steady, straight leg lines.
fit.athletic_trim: Maintain easy room through the shoulders while keeping legs streamlined.

sceneNote.daily: Framed for everyday routines: campus, errands, and casual social blocks.
sceneNote.date: Tuned for closer social distance: cafés, galleries, and evening strolls.
sceneNote.interview: Keeps formality cues clear while staying comfortable under pressure.
sceneNote.travel: Built for movement: airports, city walking, and changing temperatures.
sceneNote.school: Practical for long days on foot with simple layering options.
sceneNote.work: Anchored to desk-to-meeting rhythms with neat, low-fuss upkeep.

itemFitReasons.top_fit_and_size_match: Top fit and size range match your profile.
itemFitReasons.top_fit_size_fallback: Top fit works; size is close to your estimated range.
itemFitReasons.bottom_scene_ready_date: Bottom silhouette supports a balanced date look.
itemFitReasons.bottom_scene_ready_interview: Bottom silhouette stays clean for interview formality.
itemFitReasons.bottom_scene_ready_travel: Bottom silhouette prioritizes comfort for travel.
itemFitReasons.bottom_scene_ready_school: Bottom silhouette is practical for school mobility.
itemFitReasons.bottom_scene_ready_work: Bottom silhouette stays neat for work settings.
itemFitReasons.budget_within_target: Estimated total is within your budget target.
itemFitReasons.budget_over_target: Estimated total is above budget; consider swapping one item.
